predictedBugs: Security lens may false-refute real security findings that don't use standard vulnerability keywords (e.g., novel injection patterns not matching the keyword list) — mitigated by the vulnerability keyword check array

Worker loop mutates shared `queue` array via shift() concurrently across workers; while JS is single-threaded, one worker could starve other workers if findings pile up — mitigated by Promise-based microtask scheduling
Disputed-findings.json is read-written without file locking; concurrent adversarial-review runs could conflict — mitigated by atomic write pattern (JSON.stringify + writeFile)
edgeCases: Empty findings array: returns empty AdversarialVerificationResult with totalFindings=0, all arrays empty
Single finding with multiple identical files: each finding is processed independently regardless of file path overlap
Very large batch (1000+ witnesses findings): worker loop limits concurrency via maxParallel (default min(3, findings.length))
